Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x4500 "TITANICBLINKY-4500" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Titanic Blinky.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Inserted the instructions LDA #$20, STA $FF (which sets $FF = $20) at $4526 to ensure the game runs correctly (without this, the character cannot shoot anything or lose any energy).
